ui.app.title: Stackverse Bookmarks
ui.theme.label: Theme
ui.bookmarks.empty: No bookmarks yet — add your first one.
ui.field.title: Title
error.bookmark.hidden-publish: This bookmark was hidden by moderation and cannot be made public.
validation.url.invalid: URL must be a valid absolute http(s) address.
validation.title.too-long: Title must be at most 200 characters.
validation.notes.too-long: Notes must be at most 4000 characters.
validation.tags.too-many: A bookmark can have at most 10 tags.
validation.tag.invalid: Tags must be lowercase slugs (letters, digits, dashes).
validation.message.key.invalid: Message key must be dot-separated lowercase segments.
validation.message.language.invalid: Language must be a two-letter ISO 639-1 code.
validation.report.reason.invalid: Report reason must be one of: spam, offensive, broken-link, other.
validation.report.comment.too-long: Report comment must be at most 1000 characters.
validation.block.reason.required: A reason is required when blocking a user.
validation.block.reason.too-long: Block reason must be at most 1000 characters.
validation.resolution.invalid: Resolution must be one of: dismissed, actioned.
validation.resolution.note.too-long: Resolution note must be at most 1000 characters.
validation.bookmark-status.invalid: Status must be one of: active, hidden.
validation.bookmark-status.note.too-long: Note must be at most 1000 characters.
validation.message.text.too-long: Message text must be at most 2000 characters.
validation.message.description.too-long: Description must be at most 1000 characters.
